# Let's read the file content
path = "/mnt/data/file-TCV5oMbuvQ7mgQYDEAq8SQ-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

text = open("/mnt/data/file-TCV5oMbuvQ7mgQYDEAq8SQ-text_to_analyse.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8").read()

# Find all spans between double quotes "
spans_quotes = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('"', start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find('"', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    inner = text[i+1:j]
    # record trimmed indices: remove leading/trailing whitespace from inner
    inner_stripped = inner.strip()
    # find the stripped start offset relative to i+1
    offset_left = len(inner) - len(inner.lstrip())
    offset_right = len(inner) - len(inner.rstrip())
    start_idx = i+1+offset_left
    end_idx = j - offset_right  # exclusive
    spans_quotes.append((start_idx, end_idx, text[start_idx:end_idx]))
    start = j+1

spans_quotes

# Find spans between Arabic Quranic brackets ﴿ and ﴾
spans_quran_brackets = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('﴿', start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find('﴾', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    inner = text[i+1:j]
    inner_stripped = inner.strip()
    # edges might not have spaces; but strip to be safe
    # compute offsets
    offset_left = len(inner) - len(inner.lstrip())
    offset_right = len(inner) - len(inner.rstrip())
    start_idx = i+1+offset_left
    end_idx = j - offset_right  # exclusive
    spans_quran_brackets.append((start_idx, end_idx, text[start_idx:end_idx]))
    start = j+1

spans_quran_brackets

targets = [
    "اشترى طعاماً من يهودي إلى أجل، ورهنَه درعاً من حديد",
    "قيل يا رسول الله أي الكسب أطيب؟"
]
for t in targets:
    idx = text.find(t)
    print(t, idx)

t2 = "قيل يا رسول الله أي الكسب أطيب"
idx2 = text.find(t2)
idx2, text[idx2:idx2+len(t2)+2]

s = "أفضل الكسب عمل الرجل بيده وكل بيع مبرور"
indices = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find(s, start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    indices.append(i)
    start = i+1
indices

i2 = 3736
s = "أفضل الكسب عمل الرجل بيده وكل بيع مبرور"
end2 = i2+len(s)
text[i2-20:end2+10]

# Compute ends for manual spans
text = open("/mnt/data/file-TCV5oMbuvQ7mgQYDEAq8SQ-text_to_analyse.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8").read()
s1 = "اشترى طعاماً من يهودي إلى أجل، ورهنَه درعاً من حديد"
start1 = text.find(s1)
end1 = start1 + len(s1)

s2 = "أفضل الكسب عمل الرجل بيده وكل بيع مبرور"
# second occurrence start is at 3736
start2_list = [i for i in range(len(text)) if text.startswith(s2, i)]
start2_list, len(s2)

start2 = 3736
end2 = start2 + len(s2)

s3 = "قيل يا رسول الله أي الكسب أطيب"
start3 = text.find(s3)
end3 = start3 + len(s3)

(start1, end1, text[start1:end1]), (start2, end2, text[start2:end2]), (start3, end3, text[start3:end3])

t = "بِبَيْعِكُمُ الَّذِي بَايَعْتُمْ بِهِ وَذَلِكَ هُوَ الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ"
idx = text.find(t)
idx, text[idx:idx+len(t)+2]

# Build the citations list
citations = []

# From quotes with manual classification
quotes_spans = [
    (287, 333, 'Aya'),
    (510, 575, 'Aya'),
    (684, 900, 'Aya'),
    (1270, 1309, 'Hadeeth'),
    (2379, 2496, 'Hadeeth'),
    (3961, 4040, 'Hadeeth'),
]

for s, e, typ in quotes_spans:
    citations.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": text[s:e], "citation_type": "Aya" if typ=='Aya' else "Hadeeth"})

# Quran bracket spans all Aya
for s, e, t in spans_quran_brackets:
    citations.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": t, "citation_type": "Aya"})

# Manual hadith spans
manual_hadith = [
    (2685, 2736),
    (3736, 3775),
    (3811, 3841),
]

for s,e in manual_hadith:
    citations.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": text[s:e], "citation_type": "Hadeeth"})

# Also add the "بِبَيْعِكُمُ ..." aya span
s = 2802
e = 2802 + len("بِبَيْعِكُمُ الَّذِي بَايَعْتُمْ بِهِ وَذَلِكَ هُوَ الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ")
citations.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": text[s:e], "citation_type": "Aya"})

len(citations), citations[:3]
